zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Carlyle於1262年10月12日出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安利思時，他的父親William Carlyle the younger19歲，母親Sapientia de Bochardeby15歲。他和Margaret de Brus至少有6個兒子。他去世於1329年3月在蘇格蘭度福利爾安南達爾 迪斯特利可特享年66歲。

nameMeanings.name: Carlyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish (Dumfriesshire): variant of   Carlisle  .

variants.name: Carlisle
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from the Cumbrian city of Carlisle, in whose name Celtic cair ‘fort’ has been compounded with the Romano-British name of the settlement, Luguvalium.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Carlyle was born on 12 October 1262, in Leith, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Carlyle the younger, was 19 and his mother, Sapientia de Bochardeby, was 15. He had at least 6 sons with Margaret de Brus. He died in March 1329, in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Carlyle est né le 12 octobre 1262, à Leith, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Carlyle the younger, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Sapientia de Bochardeby, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils avec Margaret de Brus. Il est décédé en mars 1329, à Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Carlyle am 12. Oktober 1262 in Leith, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Carlyle the younger 19 und seine Mutter Sapientia de Bochardeby 15. Er hatte mit Margaret de Brus mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb im März 1329 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Carlyle è nato il il 12 ottobre 1262 nel Leith, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Carlyle the younger, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Sapientia de Bochardeby, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli con Margaret de Brus. Morì nel marzo 1329, nel Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 66 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Carlyle(이)가 1262년 10월 12일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Carlyle the younger(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Sapientia de Bochardeby(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Margaret de Brus(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1329년 3월 스컷랜드 드프리실르 애난데일 디스트릭트에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos com Margaret de Brus. Ele faleceu em março de 1329, em Annandale District, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Carlyle родился 12 октября 1262 г. в местности лит, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Carlyle the younger было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Sapientia de Bochardeby, 15. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей от Margaret de Brus. Он умер марта 1329 г. в местности аннандеил дистрикт, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 66 лет.
